/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/msaa.dir/msaa.c.o CMakeFiles/msaa.dir/__/deps/getopt.c.o CMakeFiles/msaa.dir/__/deps/glad_gl.c.o -o ../../../bin/msaa  ../../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
